query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A young child with short dark hair and a small earring wears a pale long-sleeved dress with lace trim and pintuck pleats at the square neckline. The child faces the camera with a slight smile against a solid black background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A young child with short dark hair and a small earring wears a pale long-sleeved dress with lace trim and pintuck pleats at the square neckline. The child faces the camera with a slight smile. The photograph is severely underexposed, crushing the background into total blackness and submerging much of the child's face and hair in deep shadow so that only portions of the face and the light-colored dress are visible against the darkness.
